TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Anderson_(actor), title = John_Anderson_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Anderson_(actor)} }

S.FORM: John Anderson kawas tay 1922, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 10, John Anderson , squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
John Anderson kawas tay 1922, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 10, John Anderson , squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *oħn an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *oħn an*ers~ɕon , s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
